description:
Automation is a runnable instance of a Flow with a tagged spec version and
 runtime configuration.

^(spec_etag)$.description: Checksum of flow spec must match when resolving spec (concurrency control).

batch.description: Server-assigned batch name if created within a batch (optional).

flow.description: Name of flow resource to resolve spec.

groups.description: Execution groups metadata of resolved Flow spec (versioned).

inputs.description:
Initial inputs configuration as map of input node id to valid data of input
 node's declared type (well-known type wrappers used for scalar values).
 Format:
 ```
 - "bucketName": "my-storage-bucket"
 - "adSettings": { "bid": 100 }
 ```

runtime.description: Executor runtime metadata of resolved Flow spec (versioned).

specEtag.description: Checksum of flow spec must match when resolving spec (concurrency control).

timeout.description:
Execution is stopped if total time exceeds given duration.
 Default: 0 (no timeout).

title: Automation
